stemHtml: Advection fog is most likely to form when…

options.a: maritime warm air flows over a relatively warmer surface and the wind speed is greater than 15 kt.
options.b: a mild moist airstream flows over snow covered ground and the wind speed is less than 10 kt.
options.c: maritime cold air flows over a warmer surface and the wind speed is greater than 15 kt.
options.d: cold air is forced over higher ground and further adiabatic cooling occurs.
